title: rosa firmula var. versuta
intro: Rosa firmula var. versuta, also known as the Indian rose or Rosa versuta, is a species of rose native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. In terms of herbal preparations, Rosa firmula var. versuta is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
